title: TC4 focus selection packet/key flow parity
implemented: Added original F-key focus cycle and shift+F REMOVE semantics
Preserved focus ItemStack/NBT when moving between wand, pouches and inventory
Added original cameraticks volume/pitch behavior for remove and focus changes
forge_1_19_2_adapters: Off-hand focus pouch is used as the Baubles pouch priority adapter because this port does not depend on Baubles
Packet uses server context player instead of the original explicit dim/playerid fields
